name: chrome-devtools
description: One-click Codex plugin wrapper for chrome-devtools-mcp with focused browser debugging and performance skills.

interface.shortDescription: Debug, inspect, and automate Chrome from Codex
interface.longDescription: Wraps chrome-devtools-mcp as a Codex plugin so Codex can launch a live Chrome DevTools MCP server with one install and use focused skills for browser debugging and performance analysis.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect a live page in Chrome, reproduce the issue, and use DevTools MCP to debug it end to end
